title: GRCH-383 # 2 The story of the first SEX that begins with "I'm not good" A story of a 7-person condominium for men and women ~ Indecent daily life of residents ~ - Yukine Sakuragi
description: Takai sees off Sakura's back as she leaves the room, chasing after her affair partner Arima. Later, Takai was called by Sakura and told that he had returned Arima and Yori. Takai, who likes Sakura, kills his feelings and congratulates him, but when he sees Sakura who has begun to be confused about continuing his affair, he suddenly hugs him, "Isn't it me?"
